tickets.subject: Registration: New invite request
tickets.description:
Hey, my apologies, I did not have access to my work email at this time. Are you guys able to send me another link to register for KIPU please?
________________________________
From: support@kipusystems.com <support@kipusystems.com>
Sent: Thursday, January 29, 2026 12:37 PM
To: Jasmine Griggs <Jasmine.Griggs@lightfully.com>
Subject: Register for Lightfully Behavioral Health KipuEMR

You don't often get email from support@kipusystems.com. Learn why this is important<https://aka.ms/LearnAboutSenderIdentification>
CAUTION: This email originated from outside of the organization. Do not follow guidance, links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and believe the contents are safe.

Register for Lightfully Behavioral Health KipuEMR
________________________________

Hello Jasmine Griggs, Client Care Technician II,

Lightfully Behavioral Health invites you to register your new email-based user account in KipuEMR. Registration is easy! Simply click the link below and follow the prompts to set your password and complete the registration process.

IMPORTANT: Once completed, you will be required to sign-in using your registered email address. Usernames will no longer be accepted.

If you have already registered this email address for another Kipu instance, you will use the same email and password credentials to sign in. If you choose to change your password, please note that change will apply to all your Kipu instances.

REGISTER<https://lbh11926.kipuworks.com/users/invitation/accept?invitation_token=WtaXu_zzjWUFVXFt6w__>

This link will expire in 48 hours, so click the link to complete your registration now. If your link expires or you need assistance with registration, please contact an Administrator at our office.

Thank you,

Lightfully Behavioral Health

888-576-2808


This electronic communication from Lightfully Behavioral Health may contain information that is confidential or privileged. The information contained in this communication and any attachments is intended solely for use by the addressee(s). If this was erroneously sent to you, please notify us immediately and permanently delete this communication including any electronic or printed versions and attachments. Electronic communications are not secure. Please advise us if you do not wish to receive electronic communications in the future. Thank you for your courtesy and consideration in this security matter.
